ddls:
CREATE TABLE "glass_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glass sample */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production facility where the sample was collected */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch number of the production run */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was produced */,
  "refractive_index" REAL /* Refractive index of the glass sample */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Sodium content of the glass sample */,
  "magnesium" REAL /* Magnesium content of the glass sample */,
  "aluminum" REAL /* Aluminum content of the glass sample */,
  "silicon" REAL /* Silicon content of the glass sample */,
  "potassium" REAL /* Potassium content of the glass sample */,
  "calcium" REAL /* Calcium content of the glass sample */,
  "barium" REAL /* Barium content of the glass sample */,
  "iron" REAL /* Iron content of the glass sample */,
  "glass_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the glass type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample */,
  "composition_date" TEXT /* Date when the composition was determined */,
  "sample_quality" TEXT /* Overall quality of the sample */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_glass_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("glass_type_id") REFERENCES glass_types ("glass_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the production facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was established */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glass_types" (
  "glass_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glass type */,
  "glass_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the glass type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the glass type */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the glass type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the glass type was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the glass type */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the glass type is approved for production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("glass_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production facility */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was produced */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity of glass produced in the batch */,
  "batch_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the batch */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the batch */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the batch information was last updated */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the batch is approved for distribution */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample being inspected */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control inspection was performed */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the quality control */,
  "qc_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control inspection */,
  "qc_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the quality control */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the quality control record */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the quality control record was last updated */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quality control record is approved */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control record was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production facility where the inspector works */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the inspector information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inspector information was last updated */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Inspector's certification details */,
  "certification_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the inspector's certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspectors_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality control engineer, data analyst, production manager) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the user information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the access log */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Full name of the chemical element */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the chemical element */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the chemical element */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the chemical element information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the chemical element information was last updated */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the chemical element */,
  "common_uses" TEXT /* Common uses of the chemical element in glass manufacturing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_elements" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical element */,
  "content" REAL /* Content of the chemical element in the glass sample */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample element information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sample element information was last updated */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the element content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production note */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* ID of the production batch */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was recorded */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the production note */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the production note */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the production note was last updated */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the production note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_notes_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qc_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control criterion */,
  "glass_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass type */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical element */,
  "min_content" REAL /* Minimum content allowed for the element */,
  "max_content" REAL /* Maximum content allowed for the element */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the quality control criterion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the quality control criterion was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the criterion */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the criterion is approved for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qc_criteria_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES chemical_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qc_criteria_glass_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("glass_type_id") REFERENCES glass_types ("glass_type_id")
)
